## Checklist

- [ ] One logical change; no unrelated formatting churn in the diff
- [ ] Tests cover the change and the full suite passes locally
- [ ] Conventions and do-nots in `docs/agents.md` are followed
- [ ] Docs / spokes updated if a public surface or convention changed
